panels.description: Timeline of active playback sessions. Gaps indicate paused or stopped playback.

targets.expr:
sum by (user_device, item_index_clean, type) (
  label_replace(
    label_join(
      label_join(
        label_join(
          jellyfin_now_playing_state{instance=~"$instance"} == 1,
          "item_index",
          " ",
          "series_season",
          "series_episode"
        ),
        "full_name",
        " - ",
        "series_title",
        "item_index",
        "title"
      ),
      "user_device",
      " - ",
      "username",
      "device"
    ),
    "item_index_clean",
    "$1",
    "full_name",
    "^[- ]*(.*?)[- ]*$"
  )
)

panels.title: Now Playing

panels.description: Active transcoding sessions with playback and codec details.

targets.expr: max by (session_id, username, device, title, series_title, series_season, series_episode, video_codec, audio_codec, hardware_acceleration) (jellyfin_transcoding_session_info{instance=~"$instance"})

panels.title: Transcoding Sessions

panels.description: Transcode reasons for each active session.

targets.expr:
label_join(
  max by (session_id, reason) (jellyfin_transcoding_session_reason{instance=~"$instance"})
  * on (session_id) group_left(username, title)
  max by (session_id, username, title) (jellyfin_transcoding_session_info{instance=~"$instance"}),
  "session", " - ", "username", "title"
)

panels.title: Transcode Reasons

panels.description: Transcoding bitrate over time per session.
panels.title: Transcoding Bitrate

panels.description: Total storage capacity per location. Libraries sharing the same underlying disk are merged into one entry.

targets.expr:
(jellyfin_storage_used_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location!="library"} + jellyfin_storage_free_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location!="library"})
or
label_replace(
  max without (name) (jellyfin_storage_used_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location="library"})
  + max without (name) (jellyfin_storage_free_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location="library"}),
  "name", "Libraries", "", ""
)

panels.title: Total Storage

panels.description: Percentage of storage used per location. Libraries sharing the same disk are merged.

targets.expr:
100 * jellyfin_storage_used_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location!="library"}
/ (jellyfin_storage_used_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location!="library"} + jellyfin_storage_free_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location!="library"})
or
label_replace(
  100 * max without (name) (jellyfin_storage_used_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location="library"})
  / (
    max without (name) (jellyfin_storage_used_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location="library"})
    + max without (name) (jellyfin_storage_free_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location="library"})
  ),
  "name", "Libraries", "", ""
)

panels.title: Storage Usage %

panels.description: Storage breakdown per location. Libraries sharing the same disk are merged into one row.

targets.expr:
max by (name, location) (jellyfin_storage_used_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location!="library"})
or
label_replace(
  max without (name) (jellyfin_storage_used_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location="library"}),
  "name", "Libraries", "", ""
)

max by (name, location) (jellyfin_storage_free_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location!="library"})
or
label_replace(
  max without (name) (jellyfin_storage_free_bytes{instance=~"$instance",location="library"}),
  "name", "Libraries", "", ""
)

panels.title: Storage Details

panels.description: Library storage usage over time. Libraries on the same disk are merged. Stacked area shows used vs free.
panels.title: Library Storage Over Time
